_meta.purpose: Inventory of expert agent personas. 'vendored:true' ship in-repo (license-compliant, attributed). The rest are fetched ON DEMAND (the 'load the program' model) IF their license is permissive. Cataloging metadata is not redistribution.
_meta.compliance: Auto-fetch is gated by agent_router.license_ok (MIT/Apache/BSD/ISC/Unlicense/CC0 only). Non-permissive or unlicensed (e.g. NOASSERTION) sources are cataloged but NEVER auto-fetched. Fetched files land in agents/_fetched/ (gitignored per-user cache) with a SOURCE note; the source LICENSE is mirrored to agents/licenses/.
_meta.llm_independent: An agent = persona (prompt text) + role. Spawning = inject that text into a chat call to whatever endpoint is configured (subscription proxy / API / local). No coupling to any LLM.
_meta.buckets: each agent tagged with a when-to-invoke bucket (persona_market.bucket_of)
